strategic_brief.status_note: Wakeo is signaling scope expansion around end to end orchestration.
strategic_brief.sparse_explanation: This weekly layer is still early-stage. It becomes much more informative after several weeks accumulate, because the system can compare direction over time rather than just summarize one week.
strategic_brief.usage_note: Use this page for the weekly strategic read across competitors, adjacent platforms, analyst reports, and macro or regulatory signals.
team_notes: Wakeo is signaling scope expansion around end to end orchestration.
Current working thesis: Vendors are broadening the workflow scope they claim to own.
Broader platform narratives are strengthening; this makes it more important to decide where to counter-position and where to widen workflow ownership.
executive_takeaways: Wakeo is signaling scope expansion around end to end orchestration.
Wakeo is signaling AI positioning around in transit visibility.
strategic_movements: Wakeo (direct competitor) is pushing scope expansion around end to end orchestration with the claimed outcome of greater control.
Wakeo (direct competitor) is pushing AI positioning around in transit visibility with the claimed outcome of better visibility.
team_implications: Broader platform narratives are strengthening; this makes it more important to decide where to counter-position and where to widen workflow ownership.
AI claims are becoming table stakes; this raises the bar for specificity, credibility, and evidence in our decision-support story.
open_questions: Does our AI and decision-support story read as specific, credible, and tied to real operator workflows rather than generic automation language?
Decide explicitly where we wants to widen workflow ownership versus where it should partner or counter-position against broader platform narratives.
Review the thesis register and confirm whether any newly active thesis should change current positioning, roadmap framing, or founder messaging.

active_theses: Vendors are broadening the workflow scope they claim to own.
